pages.json.slugs_note: Removed 47284-item literal slug list from Master Report 2026-06-30 — this was a stale full-text mirror of data/pages.json, not referenced by build.py, and bloating the report. Source of truth for the actual slug list remains data/pages.json itself; query it directly rather than this report.

pages_json_audit.body_content_note: Pages with body content are Cornwall and Devon location pages — body_content field contains full HTML. UK location pages (e.g. house-clearance-leeds) have empty body_content and are built dynamically by build.py from a template.
pages_json_audit.meta_description_note: Only house-clearance-cost-guide has a meta description as of 2026-06-11. All 47,283 remaining pages have no meta — critical SEO gap.
pages_json_audit.meta_note_updated: All 47,287 pages now get unique meta — manual entries take priority, dynamic generation fills the rest via build.py
pages_json_audit.title_note_updated: All 47,287 pages now get unique titles — manual entries take priority, 34,866 UK location pages bulk updated to strong pattern
